diagrams.title: AND Truth Table
diagrams.description: Shows all possible combinations of two boolean operands with AND result
diagrams.purpose: Learn the fundamental AND logic - both must be true

diagrams.title: OR Truth Table
diagrams.description: Shows all possible combinations of two boolean operands with OR result
diagrams.purpose: Learn OR logic - at least one must be true

diagrams.title: XOR Truth Table
diagrams.description: Shows exclusive OR results - true only when operands differ
diagrams.purpose: Learn XOR - exactly one must be true

diagrams.title: Short-Circuit Flow
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how && and || short-circuit evaluation works
diagrams.purpose: Understand efficiency benefits of short-circuit operators

diagrams.title: De Morgan's Laws Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of both De Morgan's transformation laws
elements: NOT outside distributes and inverts inside operators
diagrams.purpose: Remember how to transform negated boolean expressions
